title: Nutrient Strength
subtitle: Building with balanced nutrition
description: At this stage, your energy levels are likely more stable and your appetite stronger. This is a good time to focus on nutrient-dense meals, especially including protein and calcium, to support your body’s growing needs.
what_to_expect: Better tolerance for a variety of foods
nutrition_focus: Include calcium-rich foods in daily meals
Focus on nutrient-dense and balanced meals
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, papaya, orange, and guava
Vegetables including spinach, broccoli, beans, and carrots
Protein sources like curd, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
hydration: Drink water regularly throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, or lemon water
reassurance: Balanced and nutrient-rich meals help you feel stronger and support your body's needs.

diabetes.personalized_description: Balanced and nutrient-dense meals support stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
Avoid sudden increases in portion sizes
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Balanced meals support steady energy and stability.

anemia.personalized_description: Improved appetite helps include more iron-rich foods for better energy levels.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Consistent nutrition supports your strength and vitality.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals with controlled salt intake support stable blood pressure.
nutrition_focus: Keep meals balanced and moderate in salt
hypertension.reassurance: Consistent and balanced meals support a calm routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: A nutrient-rich and balanced diet supports metabolic stability.
thyroid.reassurance: Balanced nutrition supports your body's natural rhythm.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, focusing on nutrient-dense and balanced meals becomes especially important.
priority_nutrition: Focus on balanced and nutrient-rich meals
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Nutrient-rich meals support your strength and overall well-being.
